title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RBwAPR-2nD&R11e-LR2, wAP LoRa2 kit
description: wAP LoRa2 is a complete out-of-the-box solution for use as a gateway to a LoRaWAN network. The device includes a pre-installed R11e-LR2 module for forwarding UDP packets to any public or private LoRa server, 1 RJ45 Ethernet port as well as a 2.4GHz wireless card to build an access point. All this in the well-known wAP design for outdoor mounting on a wall or mast The device has a built-in antenna with a gain of 4.7 dBi for connection to the LoRa network. You can also connect an external antenna via SMA connector to achieve greater distance This gateway also works with the 2.4 GHz frequency for LoRa®, which means significantly higher bandwidth, higher data transfer rates and shorter transmission times. And thanks to the Chirp modulation technology it does not interfere with the 2.4 GHz WLAN signal ! An ideal solution for industrial assemblies with a high density of sensors LoRa is a solution for wireless data transmission, where the main goal is the lowest possible power consumption at low acquisition costs and a small data flow is sufficient MikroTik LoRa products are ready (not only) for the global network The Things Network - a well-known open source infrastructure that provides coverage of LoRa networks and thousands of useful applications. With The Things Network, you can get started with the Internet of Things in just one day. You can also easily upgrade to the enterprise solution of The Things Industries Device Mounting bracket PoE injector Power adapter 24 V/0.8 A Plastic stand Metal drawstring 35cm 4-pin cable
